decisions: Accept protocol-level fixture m4.determinism-replay-001 as the deterministic M4 replay path shared by Node runner and worker-compatible host canary.

Accept explicit M4 save-format v1 rejection for this task because requestSaveV1 rejects M4 runtime state before lossy serialization and loadSaveV1 rejects missing-M4 snapshots without mutating the original runtime.
Do not broaden gameplay, UI, Electron, networking, telemetry, manual battle, 3D, multiplayer/server, or arbitrary-code mod scope in this validation task.
risks: M4 runtime persistence remains intentionally unsupported in save-format v1 until a future schema-backed M4 DTO task enables it.
Browser parity evidence follows the existing worker-compatible adapter/canary path rather than introducing a new browser Worker test harness in this task.
requested_action: Commit accepted implementation, open PR, wait for CI, merge, sync main, then mark task CLOSED only after main integration.
